name: SQUEALER

abilities.name: Chow Time
abilities.text: After this model removes a Remains or enemy Scheme marker, it gains a Glutted token.

abilities.name: Follow the Squeal
abilities.text: After this model resolves an attack action, this model may remove a Glutted token. If it does so, an ally in LoS is moved up to 4" toward this model.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Glutted token to reduce the damage dealt by 2.

actions.name: Projected Squeal
actions.effects: If the target is within 1" of blocking terrain, this action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Soothing Tones
triggers.text: Allies within (1)2" of this model heal 1.

actions.name: Lure
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp toward this model.

actions.name: Rooting Around
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Remains or Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4" toward the target, then remove the target.

extraction_notes: Model has Minion (3) characteristic, indicating model_limit of 3
